posts.text:
BREAKING: President Trump says the US and Iran are "getting a lot closer" to finalizing a deal, per CBS News.

President Trump is now scheduled to speak with leaders of Gulf countries this afternoon regarding a potential deal.

Sources familiar with the negotiations say the latest proposal includes a process to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, the unfreezing of some Iranian assets, and a continuation of negotiations.

More information is expected in the coming hours.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: I’m sure this will be fascinating👇👇
